notes.author: Buddy Williams
notes.body: Temporarily parked after automation claimed this implementation during the contract Goal review-to-revision interval. Do not resume until contract Goal 00000SZ2HZ9S31P6FH65XVA00C is approved and merged. The interrupted worktree is not authoritative and must be reconciled against the final contract before implementation.

notes.author: Buddy Williams
notes.body: Contract dependency satisfied: Goal 00000SZ2HZ9S31P6FH65XVA00C is done and merged at 6b9638c. Resumed as Round 2 so implementation starts from the merged contract rather than the interrupted pre-contract Round 1 branch.

rounds.prompt: Implement the shared workflow consistency and durable-evidence contract produced by the preceding ordered Goal. Reuse the existing Process, Workflow, operation registry, capacity, Goal/state, Git/worktree, and observability capabilities; do not add a second orchestration system or surface-specific control path. Establish one explicit cross-process coordination model that every authoritative workflow-state writer participates in, or equivalently version and revalidate all authoritative evidence so stale writers cannot resurrect or contradict terminal state. Preserve durable target-app ownership across app switches and detach, make operation, claim, process, capacity, Goal evidence, repository evidence, and logs converge under cancellation, recovery, restart, and late settlement, and define crash-safe persistence and failure recovery consistent with the contract. Include compatible migration for existing durable records. Exercise production-shaped multi-process paths with the real daemon/workflow runner and shared APIs, including concurrent mutation, cancellation, provider completion/failure, app switch, restart/crash, write/log failure, and capacity release; use the smallest focused evidence that proves the invariants. Keep UI, CLI, API, and MCP thin and semantically consistent. Treat the parked branches aafdc696 and c1e9a9a as prototypes and evidence only; do not silently merge their Supervisor- or Quality-specific behavior. After this foundation is reviewed and merged, those existing Goals will resume on top of it.

The minimal shared workflow consistency contract from Goal 00000SZ2HZ9S31P6FH65XVA00C is now approved and merged on main at 6b9638c. Implement the original Round 1 objective fully against that contract and current main. Preserve its implementation scope and production-shaped concurrency, cancellation, provider settlement, target-app switch, restart/crash, persistence/log failure, capacity, and thin-surface evidence requirements, but choose the simplest coherent mechanism that satisfies the Intent invariants rather than recreating the discarded detailed documentation recipe. Reconcile or ignore the interrupted clean Round 1 worktree; do not treat it, aafdc696, or c1e9a9a as authoritative or merge them wholesale. Use existing Process, Workflow, operation, capacity, Goal/state, Git/worktree, and observability capabilities. Keep this implementation grounded in shared capability truth and leave Quality and Supervisor-specific behavior parked until this foundation is reviewed and merged.
